steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The text needs a sentence that provides an example of a particle physicist — a specific, named individual who works in the field.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Neutrinos are a type of subatomic particle that particle physicists are still trying to understand.": Discusses neutrinos without naming any physicist. No example given. ✗
  • "By studying solar and geoneutrinos—to name just one example—particle physicists can learn more about neutrinos.": Describes research techniques but still names no individual physicist. ✗
  • "Particle physicist Gianpaolo Bellini is known for his research on solar and geoneutrinos.": Names a specific particle physicist and describes his research focus — exactly the example the text requires. ✓
  • "The research done on solar and geoneutrinos exemplifies the work particle physicists do to advance our understanding of subatomic particles.": A general claim about neutrinos, no named physicist. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
